ops.body: Prereg + driver + 3 concurrent Tinker runs submitted (run ids in results/E12/submitted/*.json), launchd com.cc-steer.e12-train self-driving, ETA 3-5h to phases/train_all.done. Clamp-lift operationalization ACCEPTED by orchestrator (see note). Remaining: cid ($0) then corrected paired gate (~200 judge calls) then verdict.
